description: TAM anchor_step sweep: anchor_step=1 (PGD on 1 opt_step unroll). All else fixed: pgd_delta=1.5, mining_opt_steps=3, gc_loss. Compare to q220 (anchor_step=2). If anchor_step=1 is too close to x_pos, expects large neg_dist; if too far, trajectory never moves. SUCCESS: val_mse < 0.00975 and anchor_dist in (0.2, 5.0).
notes: TAM anchor_step=1 variant. Anchor PGD on 1 opt_step trajectory point instead of 2. Expects anchor_dist to vary; if too small, trajectory not moving (increase pgd_delta or anchor_step). Key diagnostic: anchor_dist should be in (0.2, 5.0). If successful, compare mse vs q220.
